subject: SOCDS 2025/26 Update Week #24 - PreK Orange Update
text:
Email Ms. Annemarie
Update on Teachers
As many of you know, Ms. Jennifer had unexpected surgery two weeks ago, and her recovery will be longer than initially anticipated. She will likely be out for about four weeks.
As a short-term solution, we have been covering the class with our current staff. Ms. Jenny, Ms. Amanda, and Ms. Theo have been doing a wonderful job with the help of the rest of the staff.
As we plan for the coming weeks, I am working to implement a more sustainable solution that maintains familiarity and consistency for your children. If you 
have any concerns or questions, please let me know.
Komitoms Music Returns
We are so excited to welcome the wonderful music of the
Komitoms
back to South Orange Country Day School.  They will join us on Tuesday morning and we are all looking forward to their rhythms and beats!
Reminder:
Bang! Cookie Sale Extended
The PEP Cookie Sale has been extended until the end of the month.
40% of all proceeds come back to PEP
to support the school!
To get started, click the link below or use the QR code to register and make an account. It only takes 2 minutes! Then purchase for yourself or share your link with friends and family to start raising money for our school.
Registration link:
https://bangcookies-fundraiser.vercel.app/join-fundraiser/south-orange-country-day-school-1769049949477
PEP Spirit Pizza Cupcake Day
March Lunch Orders
On
Friday
(2/27) we will have our monthly PEP Spirit Shirt and Pizza Cupcake Lunch.  It is also the start of a new month so don't forget to place your Simply Gourmet Lunch Orders if your child receives "school lunch."
If you have any questions or concerns, please call or text
646-226-8790
or email
learn@socds.com
.
Annemarie
South Orange Country Day School
461 Vose Avenue, South Orange
973.762.6451
You are receiving this email because your child attends SOCDS.  If you no longer wish to receive these updates, please unsubscribe below.
